title: ASR Federal Disposable Latex Glove Holder Duty Belt Hook Loop Closure EMT
description:
The ASR Federal disposable glove holder was designed with quick and easy access in mind. Whether you’re in law enforcement, EMT or EMS services, having quick access to your medical gloves is essential in an emergency situation. This glove pouch is made of sturdy black leather that is weather-resistant so you can count on it to keep your gloves safe and dry indoors or outdoors. It features a sturdy hook and loop closure that will open quickly and seal securely when not in use. Each disposable glove holder comes with a duty belt attachment so you can easily attach it to your belt for custom comfort and quick deployment. Each pouch will hold a pair of standard disposable medical gloves. This duty belt glove holder is proudly manufactured in the USA
